integrity.description: The agent used the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface to perform the tasks.

integrity.description: Encounter notes and prescriptions were created using the proper EHR forms.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to directly insert records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target untreated patients (need medication and note): Eleanor Whitfield (DOB 1962-03-15), Russell Hartley (DOB 1955-08-22), Margaret Toomey (DOB 1958-11-07). Already treated patients (do NOT need medication): Bernard Keane (on Lisinopril), Dolores Vance (on Amlodipine). Acceptable first-line antihypertensive medications include amlodipine, lisinopril, losartan, metoprolol, atenolol, hydrochlorothiazide, valsartan, ramipril, and enalapril.
